description: Arenas, theatres, event spaces — event-driven, highly irregular load profiles.

behavioral_rules.name: Event-Driven Consumption Spike
behavioral_rules.description: Consumption >3x daily average indicates active event — HVAC and lighting at full capacity.
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Link building control system to event calendar for automated scale-up.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: Event load spike detected — {value:.1f}x normal consumption (event in progress).

behavioral_rules.name: Evening and Weekend Dominance
behavioral_rules.description: 18:00-23:00 and weekends account for >60% of total energy.
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Optimize pre-event preparation time — start HVAC 90 min before, not 3h.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: Evening/weekend energy dominates at {value:.0%} — aligned with event schedule.

efficiency_rules.name: Demand Spike Detection
efficiency_rules.description: Max meter reading exceeds threshold × mean — indicates uncontrolled demand peaks.
efficiency_rules.recommendation: Implement demand response: stagger HVAC start, shift non-critical loads.
efficiency_rules.demo_alert: Peak demand is {value:.1f}x the average — opportunity to flatten load curve.

efficiency_rules.name: Slow Post-Event Ramp-Down
efficiency_rules.description: Consumption should drop to <20% within 1h after event end.
efficiency_rules.recommendation: Automate post-event shutdown sequence for HVAC and non-essential lighting.
efficiency_rules.demo_alert: Slow post-event shutdown — {value:.0%} of peak still running 1h after event.

weather_sensitivity_rules.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
weather_sensitivity_rules.description: Correlation between air_temperature and meter_reading reveals cooling/heating dependency.
weather_sensitivity_rules.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.
weather_sensitivity_rules.demo_alert: Energy use is {value:.0%} correlated with outdoor temperature.

alert_rules.name: High Night-Time Base Load
alert_rules.description: Average consumption between 11PM-5AM exceeds threshold % of daily mean.
alert_rules.recommendation: Investigate equipment left running overnight. Schedule HVAC setback.
alert_rules.demo_alert: Building is consuming {value}% of daytime energy overnight.

alert_rules.name: High Consumption During Low-Occupancy Hours
alert_rules.description: Consumption from 2:00-08:00 exceeds 15% of daily average.
alert_rules.recommendation: Configure occupancy sensors and timer-based shutdowns.
alert_rules.demo_alert: Significant energy consumed when building should be empty ({value:.0%} of daily avg).
